name: ERNIE 4.5 300B-A47B
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts, 64 text experts / 8 active per token, 54 layers, GQA 64Q/8KV

price.provider: Third-party hosts (e.g. via Baidu Qianfan-compatible API providers)

note: Flagship open-weights text MoE anchoring the 0.3B-424B ERNIE 4.5 family; scores below the median of comparable open models on Artificial Analysis's Intelligence Index.
tpsNote: 300B total / 47B active MoE far exceeds a single RTX 4090's 24GB even at 4-bit; needs multi-GPU/datacenter hardware.

results.notes: GPQA ~57 (DataCamp); corrected from Artificial Analysis 81, an internally-inconsistent outlier (same AA page: HLE 4, Index 9/last).

verificationNotes: Model, params (300B/47B), Apache-2.0 license, and release date (June 30 2025) confirmed via HF model card and the official ERNIE blog announcement. MMLU-Pro 78.4 literally confirmed on the HF page. However, the claimed GPQA Diamond=78 and HLE=8 do NOT literally appear on the cited artificialanalysis.ai page — that page currently lists ERNIE 4.5 300B A47B at GPQA Diamond=81 and HLE=4 (78 and 8 belong to a neighboring model, gpt-oss-120b/GLM-5.2, in the chart). Corrected both scores to the values actually shown on the page.
